seo.title: Beachbody Yoga Studio Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Improve your strength and flexibility with our yoga collection within the Beachbody Yoga Studio. See what it includes and any equipment needed.

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Bee has been an expert yoga and meditation teacher since 2011. She holds a 500-hour certification in the Kaivalya Yoga Method, is trained in Yoga Tune Up, and is a dedicated vipassana meditator. She was born in Turkey, grew up in England, and now resides in New York City.

Caley’s passion for yoga and love for connection with her global community has transformed her into an internationally recognized yoga teacher. She teaches a strong and playful vinyasa flow focused on empowering students to push past their perceived boundaries and open to the benefits of yoga.

High-energy Chalene turns her lifelong love of health and fitness into exciting, challenging workouts that scorch calories and burn fat. Her results-driven programs inspire people to reach for hardcore results without straining their bodies. When you’re ready to sweat, Chalene is ready for you.

Desi has been teaching health and wellness for over 20 years. Her innovative approach to teaching is to tap into one’s inner joy and let movement be an outer expression of that state. Desi holds advanced certifications in Yoga, Pre & Postnatal Fitness, Personal Training, and Group Fitness.

Barre Blend™ creator Elise Joan is a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. She is also the creator of Pre-/Postnatal Barre Blend and the “I Am” meditation series on Beachbody On Demand®. Deepen your mind/body connection and build a lean, shredded dancer’s physique with her barre, strength, yoga, and other live classes on BODi™.

Faith uses yoga’s tools of breathing, movement and flexibility in fresh ways. She blends classic yogic principles, meditation and real-world experience into a free-spirited teaching style. Always eager to learn and share, Faith is an inspiring and generous teacher to yoga students of all levels.
Yoga Booty Ballet® creators Gillian Marloth Clark and Teigh McDonough bring you a healthy, spiritual approach to fitness and unique tools for shaping a lean, sexy body.

Creator of Morning Meltdown 100 and co-creator of the MMA program CORE DE FORCE®, Jericho is an NASM and ACE certified personal trainer who has coached thousands of people all over the globe. Now she brings her world-class expertise to BODi to help you elevate your training and reach your goals faster than ever.

A lifelong athlete, Ted approaches yoga with total commitment and focus. He believes in the power of meditation and restorative yoga, which strengthens muscles, builds stamina and prevents injuries. His versatility and knowledge allow him to teach a wide range of students and a variety of styles.

Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

Originally a mathematician, Vytas has been a pioneer in the modern yoga movement for more than 15 years, bringing precision and expert instruction to everything he does. Today, he’s one of the most sought-after instructors in the world—but you can experience his transformative classes live on BODi from the comfort of home.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
